message:
fix(lint): remove unused variables and imports

- tests/e2e/projects.spec.ts: prefix unused flywheelContainer with _
- tests/unit/content-validation.test.ts: remove unused type imports
  (Project, TldrFlywheelTool)
- tests/utils/tldr-test-helpers.ts: remove unused TldrToolCategory import

All lint warnings resolved.
